title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models via simple Python API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community adapter exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs & embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-style API).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; fluent builder API, chat, embeddings, model ops.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; supports streaming chat & embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax-highlighted REPL & history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension turning Ollama models into inline GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistence support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official compose stack bundling Ollama + Open-WebUI + persistent volume.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside your notes.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: LogSeq plugin integrating Ollama for AI-assisted block generation & summarization.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Pure-Nim client for Ollama REST API with async & sync interfaces.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, push models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and streaming chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers prompts using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-traefik-plugin
summary: Traefik plugin adding OpenAI-compatible routing & load-balancing for Ollama backends.
